title: Listening - Part 1
description: You are going to read a magazine article about an intellectual process known as critical thinking. For questions 31 – 36, choose the answer (A, B, C or D) which fits best according to the text. Mark your answers on the separate answer sheet.
instructions: You will hear three different extracts. For questions 1–6, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear. There are two questions for each extract.

extracts.context: You hear two friends discussing a new city-wide art festival.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: That light installation in the park was incredible, wasn't it? || Man: [1]I found the queuing system for the indoor galleries to be a bit of a disaster[/1], to be honest. I spent more time standing on the pavement than looking at art. || Woman: I see what you mean. It was a bit overcrowded. || Man: [2]What I really liked, though, was the way they used abandoned buildings for the pop-up shows[/2]. It gave the whole event a very gritty, urban feel. || Woman: I agree. It’s a great way to revitalise those parts of the city. || Man: Exactly. It’s a fantastic concept, I just wish they’d managed the crowd flow a bit better.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That light installation in the park was incredible, wasn't it?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I found the queuing system for the indoor galleries to be a bit of a disaster, to be honest. I spent more time standing on the pavement than looking at art.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I see what you mean. It was a bit overcrowded.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What I really liked, though, was the way they used abandoned buildings for the pop-up shows. It gave the whole event a very gritty, urban feel.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I agree. It’s a great way to revitalise those parts of the city.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Exactly. It’s a fantastic concept, I just wish they’d managed the crowd flow a bit better.

questions.question: What was the man's main issue with the festival?

options.A: the quality of the local artwork

questions.explanation: He finds the 'queuing system' to be a 'disaster' and spent too much time waiting [1].

questions.question: Both speakers admired the festival's
questions.explanation: They both praise the use of 'abandoned buildings' and how it 'revitalises' those parts of the city [2].

extracts.context: You hear two colleagues talking about a new software update for their company's email system.
extracts.audio_script: Man: So, what do you think of the new 'smart-reply' feature? It’s meant to save us time on short responses. || Woman: [3]I suspect the AI is a bit too generic and ends up making me sound like a robot[/3]. || Man: It is a bit formal. I always have to edit the suggestions anyway. || Woman: [4]I’ve noticed that it often misinterprets the tone of the incoming email[/4], which could lead to some very awkward situations with clients. || Man: I agree. It doesn't really understand sarcasm or nuance yet. || Woman: Exactly. It’s a helpful tool in theory, but I think I’ll stick to typing my own replies for now.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: So, what do you think of the new 'smart-reply' feature? It’s meant to save us time on short responses.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I suspect the AI is a bit too generic and ends up making me sound like a robot.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: It is a bit formal. I always have to edit the suggestions anyway.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I’ve noticed that it often misinterprets the tone of the incoming email, which could lead to some very awkward situations with clients.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I agree. It doesn't really understand sarcasm or nuance yet.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Exactly. It’s a helpful tool in theory, but I think I’ll stick to typing my own replies for now.

questions.question: The woman believes the new feature is
questions.explanation: She thinks it's 'too generic' and makes her 'sound like a robot' [3].

questions.question: What is the speakers' main concern regarding the AI's performance?

options.A: the security of the data handled
options.B: the inability to detect emotional context

questions.explanation: They agree it 'misinterprets the tone' and doesn't understand 'sarcasm or nuance' [4].

extracts.context: You hear two people discussing a new brand of ultra-durable smartphone cases.
extracts.audio_script: Man: I’ve just bought the 'Shield-Master'. It’s supposed to survive a ten-foot drop onto concrete. || Woman: [5]I found the bulkiness of the case to be a bit of a problem[/5], to be honest. I can barely fit it in my pocket anymore. || Man: I see your point. It does turn your phone into a bit of a brick. || Woman: [6]I did think the texture of the material was excellent, though[/6]. It’s very easy to hold and doesn't feel like it’s going to slip out of my hand. || Man: I agree. The extra grip is a definite plus. || Woman: Definitely. It’s a solid piece of protection, I just wish it was a bit more sleek.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I’ve just bought the 'Shield-Master'. It’s supposed to survive a ten-foot drop onto concrete.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I found the bulkiness of the case to be a bit of a problem, to be honest. I can barely fit it in my pocket anymore.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I see your point. It does turn your phone into a bit of a brick.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I did think the texture of the material was excellent, though. It’s very easy to hold and doesn't feel like it’s going to slip out of my hand.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I agree. The extra grip is a definite plus.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Definitely. It’s a solid piece of protection, I just wish it was a bit more sleek.

questions.question: What was the woman's main reservation about the phone case?

options.B: the inconvenient size of the product

questions.explanation: She finds the 'bulkiness' a problem as it barely fits in her pocket [5].

questions.question: Both speakers were impressed by the case's
questions.explanation: They both praise the 'texture' and 'extra grip' of the material [6].
